description: Address review issues: (1) Reset hysteresis state on position timeout, (2) Use single time.time() in fire_signal, (3) Add comment to TRAIL_TIERS, (4) Add test for hysteresis reset on timeout.
steps: Step 1 - Fix Issue #2: Reset last_signal_direction=None and last_signal_price=0.0 in check_position_timeout() when position is reset.
Step 2 - Fix Issue #3: Use a single now=time.time() in fire_signal and assign both last_signal_time and position_open_time from it.
Step 3 - Fix Issue #4: Add a comment to TRAIL_TIERS in config.py noting it is retained for reference/future use.
Step 4 - Add test: Verify hysteresis state (last_signal_direction, last_signal_price) is reset when position timeout fires.
acceptance_criteria: fire_signal uses a single time.time() call for both timestamps
TRAIL_TIERS has a comment explaining it is retained for future use
New test verifies hysteresis state reset on position timeout
